coverage.notes: Engine.Types fixes verified by 16 new tests. Phase 3 partial split covered by all existing Data tests (unchanged behavior) + 8 new envelope/attribute tests. Data.Result.cs, Data.Navigation.cs covered by existing tests that moved with the code. View.cs Out enum tested.

findings.issue: Signature and Verified tests only verify property get/set and attribute presence. No test verifies that Signature is excluded from standard JSON serialization (it has [JsonIgnore]). If someone removes [JsonIgnore], Signature would leak into normal serialization but tests wouldn't catch it.
findings.impact: Low — [JsonIgnore] is the existing pattern and unlikely to be removed. But the Signature specifically should NOT appear in non-Out serialization for security reasons.
findings.suggestion: Add a test that serializes Data to JSON and verifies Signature is NOT present in the output. Or verify the [JsonIgnore] attribute is present (like the [Out] test does).

findings.issue: Data.Navigation (GetChild) was moved to its own partial file. The _context field is accessed across partial files (Navigation reads _context, core Data sets it). No test verifies that the partial class split didn't break field access — but the existing GetChild_InheritsContext test from Phase 2 covers this implicitly.
findings.impact: None — partial classes share all fields by definition. This is just a note that the existing test coverage catches any compilation issues.
findings.suggestion: No action needed. Existing tests cover this.

findings.issue: View.Out attribute and enum value exist but no serializer test verifies that the [Out] attribute actually controls serialization output. The attribute is defined but its effect on serialization is untested — no serializer currently reads it.
findings.impact: None yet — Phase 4 will wire the serializer to respect [Out]. When that happens, the attribute needs serializer-level tests.
findings.suggestion: Deferred to Phase 4. The attribute definition is correct.

summary: 1349 tests pass, 0 failures. All v2 critical/major findings are fixed: Add→KindOf pipeline works, null guards added, backtick stripped, BuilderNames/ComplexSchemas tested. Phase 3 partial class split is clean — all existing tests pass unchanged, 8 new envelope/attribute tests added. The split is purely structural with no behavior change. Only 3 minor findings remain (Signature JsonIgnore not tested, partial field access note, Out attribute effect deferred). Verdict: approved for auditor review.
